62 DAY TARGET: 01/04/2024

Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date.

Diagnosis: Rectal adenocarcinoma
ICD10 Code: D12.6
Differentiation: Poorly differentiated

Symptoms include weight loss, bloody discharge, reduced appetite and abdominal bloating for 2 months. Additional symptoms include early satiety.

Imaging:
CT abdomen on 02/01/2024: mural thickening at rectosigmoid junction, inflammatory vs neoplastic.
If malignant staging is T3 N0 M1- liver
